request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that domestic security agencies are being deliberately hindered by outdated privacy laws? While we debate civil liberties, foreign actors are exploiting these gaps to plan attacks. Our agencies need expanded powers to monitor and intercept threats before they strike. It's our duty to ensure public safety isn't compromised by bureaucratic inertia. #NationalSecurityFirst #ModernizeForSafety
